title: Harris Beach State Park
html:
Harris Beach State Park

Stub. Oregon coast park near Brookings, used by the Yahir family for RV camping. First-mentioned destination of the December 2020 birthday RV trip in 2020 11 28 yt kids games rv birthday plan and prep-listed in 2020 12 03 rv trip prep. Functions as a Grants Pass-orbit family-getaway anchor.
